concerns: Race condition mitigation (noclobber per-ticket claim file) is listed as a risk but has no corresponding plan step. This should be a discrete step to be safe.
prd.json concurrent write protection is flagged as a risk but no plan step addresses it — adding a prd.lock with noclobber should be explicit.
--clean must remove LOCK* (not just LOCK) per the risks section, but no step updates clean.sh.
lib/lock.sh does not currently exist; the plan implicitly creates it. This should be stated explicitly to avoid confusion during implementation.
shellcheck (typecheck) is an acceptance criterion but is not called out in any step — add a validation step or testing note to confirm shellcheck passes after all changes.
